items.title: ai-agent-architecture
items.summary: Build LLM systems you actually control. A free, open engineering book + course — from tokenization to serving your own models. Mechanisms, trade-offs, and numbers, not prompt tips
items.summary_cn: 构建您实际控制的LLM系统。一本免费、开放的工程书籍+课程--从令牌化到为您自己的模型服务。机制、权衡和数字，而不是提示提示
items.comment: 开源阵营再下一城，光看参数没用，能跑起来、好不好用才是关键。

items.title: Predictor
items.summary: Open-source AI prediction engine for numerical data analysis and machine learning.
items.summary_cn: 用于数值数据分析和机器学习的开源AI预测引擎。
items.comment: 开源项目值得支持，文档和社区活跃度比 star 数更重要。

items.title: Copy Less, Ground More: Overcoming Repetitive Copying in Long-Context Reasoning via Evidence-Aware Reinforcement Learning
items.title_cn: 少复制，多拓展：通过循证强化学习克服长语境推理中的重复复制
items.summary: Large language models that generate step-by-step reasoning traces have achieved strong performance on complex tasks, and extending them to long-context settings has emerged as an important frontier. However, we identify a critical failure mode in this regime: \emph{repetitive copying}, where models ...
items.summary_cn: 生成逐步推理轨迹的大型语言模型在复杂任务上取得了强大的性能，并将其扩展到长语境设置已成为一个重要的前沿领域。但是，我们在此方案中确定了一种关键故障模式：\ emph {重复复制} ，其中模型...
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: Appearance Pointers -- Multimodal Region Control of Diffusion Transformers
items.title_cn: 外观指针--扩散变压器多模态区域控制
items.summary: Controllable image generation remains challenging for creative professionals, who often require precise regional control over materials, object identities, and spatial arrangements that cannot be reliably achieved through text prompting alone. Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) can natively ingest hetero...
items.summary_cn: 对于创意专业人士来说，可控图像生成仍然具有挑战性，他们通常需要对材料、对象身份和空间安排进行精确的区域控制，而仅靠文本提示无法可靠地实现这些控制。扩散变压器（ DiT ）可以原生摄取异质...
items.comment: AI 领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: CodeRescue: Budget-Calibrated Recovery Routing for Coding Agents
items.title_cn: CodeRescue ：编码代理的预算校准恢复路由
items.summary: Coding agents increasingly operate in executable environments where a failed attempt produces actionable feedback rather than merely an incorrect answer. Existing cost-aware systems typically treat such failures as cascade decisions: try a cheap model first, then escalate hard cases to a stronger an...
items.summary_cn: 编码代理越来越多地在可执行环境中运行，其中失败的尝试会产生可操作的反馈，而不仅仅是错误的答案。现有的成本感知系统通常将此类故障视为级联决策：首先尝试廉价模型，然后将困难案例升级到更强大的...
items.comment: 商业模型再升级，功能看着牛，钱包要捂紧。

items.title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
items.title_cn: GLOW以12亿美元的估值脱颖而出，在人工智能时代挑战端点安全
items.summary: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.
items.summary_cn: Glow正在瞄准企业内部快速采用人工智能代理和开发人员工具所带来的一类新型端点风险。
items.comment: API 上线了，功能强大但按量付费，小团队用前要算好账。

items.title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
items.title_cn: Synthesia的人工智能培训平台正在从视频转向现场辅导
items.summary: Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an interactive enterprise training platform where employees practice workplace conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback, scoring, and analytics to help companies measure training effectiveness.
items.summary_cn: Synthesia推出了AI Roleplay Sessions ，这是一个交互式企业培训平台，员工可以通过AI头像练习工作场所的对话，提供反馈、评分和分析，帮助公司衡量培训效果。
items.comment: 又是一个「史上最强」，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。

items.title: The Anthropic-Physical Intelligence rumor roiling AI Twitter
items.title_cn: The Anthropic-Physical Intelligence谣言搅乱了AI Twitter
items.summary: Anthropic and OpenAI's aggressive 2026 acquisition sprees set the stage for a weekend rumor.
items.summary_cn: Anthropic和OpenAI积极的2026年收购热潮为周末的谣言奠定了基础。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: I graded 36 popular MCP servers on agent usability. A third got a D or F
items.title_cn: 我根据代理可用性对36台流行的MCP服务器进行了评分。三分之一的人得了D或F
items.summary: I graded 36 popular MCP servers on agent usability. A third got a D or F
items.summary_cn: 我根据代理可用性对36台流行的MCP服务器进行了评分。三分之一的人得了D或F
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。
